# Copyright {.unnumbered}

::: {.content-visible when-format='pdf'}
\thispagestyle{empty}
\vspace*{\fill}
:::

**Biostatistics Practicum**\
A graduate textbook in applied biostatistics.

Copyright &copy; 2026 Ronald "Ryy" G. Thomas.

This work is licensed under a Creative Commons
Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivatives 4.0 International
License. To view a copy of this license, visit
<https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/4.0/>.

No ISBN has been assigned; this is an open-access teaching
text. Citations should use the form:

> Thomas, R. G. (2026). *Biostatistics Practicum*. La Jolla,
> California. Retrieved from <https://rgtlab.org/practicum>.

Typeset in Source Sans 3 and JetBrains Mono using Quarto
and `xelatex`. Source available at
<https://github.com/rgt47/practicum>.

First draft: Spring 2026.
